scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:templates
scripts.suggest:apply: node scripts/optional/comment-tools.mjs apply --mode=apply --limit=50 && npm run build:templates
scripts.dedupe:short: node scripts/optional/comment-tools.mjs dedupe && npm run build:templates
scripts.dedupe:short:global: node scripts/optional/comment-tools.mjs dedupe --scope=global && npm run build:templates
